zh.lifeSummary: 當John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield於大約1475年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Alexandre Gaillard26歲，母親Jeanne Delange26歲。他於大約1494年與Julia Ann Le Targe在英國英格蘭薩默塞特蘭福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年12月23日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特蘭福德 布德維爾享年91歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特蘭福德 布德維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield于大约1475年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Alexandre Gaillard26岁，母亲Jeanne Delange26岁。他于大约1494年与Julia Ann Le Targe在英国英格兰薩默塞特蘭福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年12月23日在英国英格兰薩默塞特蘭福德 布德維爾享年91岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特蘭福德 布德維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gaylord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern, of Norman origin): variant of Gaylard altered by folk etymology, from the Old French and Middle English personal name Gaillart, Gallard, Galliard, representing either the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard (composed of elements meaning ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + ‘hard, firm, resilient, strong’) or Old French gaillard, gaillart ‘vigorous, powerful, strong’. Alternatively, from Middle English gaillard, galiard ‘brave, strong, valiant’, also ‘lively, gay, gaily dressed’.
Altered form of Gaylard, itself an Anglicized form of French Gaillard , which was brought to England by the Huguenots.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Gaillard  .

variants.name: Gaillard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Philippe, Pierre, Andre, Andree, Ketly, Marcel, Mirlande, Monique.
French: nickname from gaillard ‘vigorous, strong’ (ultimately from Celtic galia ‘strength’). This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard, composed of the elements gail ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + hard ‘hard, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Antonie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Anthony  , unaltered since classical times, when it was a common Roman feminine family name.

variants.name: Anthonia
meanings: Variant spelling of   Antonia  , modelled on the spelling of   Anthony .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield was born about 1475, in Normandy, France, his father, Alexandre Gaillard, was 26 and his mother, Jeanne Delange, was 26. He married Julia Ann Le Targe about 1494, in Langford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 December 1565, in Langford Budville, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Langford Budville, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield est né environ 1475, à Normandie, France, son père, Alexandre Gaillard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Delange, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Julia Ann Le Targe environ 1494, à Langford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 décembre 1565, à Langford Budville, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Langford Budville, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield um 1475 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexandre Gaillard 26 und seine Mutter Jeanne Delange 26. Er hat um 1494 in Langford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Julia Ann Le Targe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Dezember 1565 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Langford Budville, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Langford Budville, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield è nato il circa 1475 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Alexandre Gaillard, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne Delange, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Julia Ann Le Targe circa 1494, nel Langford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1565, nel Langford Budville, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Langford Budville, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfieldが約1475年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Alexandre Gaillardは26歳，母Jeanne Delangeは26歳であった。約1494年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラングフォードでJulia Ann Le Targeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年12月23日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラングフォード ブドヴィルで91歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトラングフォード ブドヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield(이)가 대략 1475년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexandre Gaillard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Delange(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 랭퍼드에서 Julia Ann Le Targe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 12월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 랭퍼드 버드빌에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 랭퍼드 버드빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Alexandre Gaillard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Delange, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Julia Ann Le Targe aproximadamente 1494, em Langford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1565, em Langford Budville, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Langford Budville, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield родился около 1475 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Alexandre Gaillard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Delange, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Julia Ann Le Targe около 1494 г. в местности лангфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 декабря 1565 г. в местности лангфорд будвилл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности лангфорд будвилл, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Julia Ann Le Targe aproximadamente 1494, en Langford, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1565, en Langford Budville, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Langford Budville, Somerset, Inglaterra.
